//: Root package.json exists solely to declare the pnpm workspace that aspect_rules_js reads via npm_translate_lock. No runtime deps here; individual packages live under the workspace members (currently just frontend_web/). See ADR-0015 for why this lives at the repo root and why pnpm specifically.
name: aegis-core-root

pnpm.//overrides: Force patch-level bumps of transitive deps flagged by Dependabot. postcss 8.5.10 fixes CVE-2026-41305 (moderate); @babel/core 7.29.6 fixes CVE-2026-49356 (low). Both are pulled transitively (vite / @vitejs/plugin-react) at API-compatible patch versions, so an override is the lowest-risk fix until the parents widen their ranges.
